prompts.title: Black and White Portrait Art
prompts.author: ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
prompts.prompt:
A high-resolution black and white portrait artwork, in an editorial and fine art photography style. The background features a soft gradient, transitioning from mid-gray to almost pure white, creating a sense of depth and tranquility. Fine film grain adds a tactile, analog-like softness to the image, reminiscent of classic black and white photography.

On the right side of the frame, a blurred yet striking face of Harry Potter subtly emerges from the shadows, not in a traditional pose, but as if caught in a moment of thought or breath. Only a part of his face is visible: perhaps an eye, a cheekbone, the contour of his lips, evoking a sense of mystery, intimacy, and elegance. His features are delicate yet profound, exuding a melancholic and poetic beauty without being overly dramatic.

A gentle, directional light, softly diffused, caresses the curve of his cheek or glints in his eye—this is the emotional core of the image. The rest of the composition is dominated by ample negative space, intentionally kept simple, allowing the image to breathe. There are no texts, no logos in the image—only an interplay of light, shadow, and emotion.

The overall atmosphere is abstract yet deeply human, like a fleeting glance or a half-remembered dream: intimate, timeless, and poignantly beautiful.

prompts.title: Perspective 3D Pop-Out Effect
prompts.author: ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
prompts.prompt: Hyperrealistic, top-down bird's-eye view shot, a beautiful Instagram model [Anne Hathaway / see reference image], with exquisite and beautiful makeup and fashionable styling, standing on the screen of a smartphone held up by someone. The image creates a strong perspective illusion. Emphasize the 3D effect of the girl standing out from the phone. She wears black-rimmed glasses, high-street fashion, and strikes a cute, playful pose. The phone screen is treated as a dark floor, like a small stage. The scene uses strong forced perspective to show the proportional difference between the hand, the phone, and the girl. The background is clean gray, using soft indoor light, shallow depth of field, and the overall style is surrealistic photorealistic compositing. Very strong perspective.
prompts.note: You can replace [Anne Hathaway] in the prompt with other character names. Or use a photo of a person as a reference image.

prompts.title: Anime Martial Arts Battle Illustration

In the foreground, a girl with black hair in a high bun wears a {argument name="character 1 color theme" default="red and white"} Chinese-style martial arts outfit with baggy pants. She is in a dynamic, low, forward-thrusting stance, surrounded by swirling red energy and water splashes. In the background to the right, a girl with light purple hair in twin buns wears a {argument name="character 2 color theme" default="green and purple"} Chinese dress with gold embroidery and black tights. prompts.title: Ultra-realistic 3D Game
prompts.author: ZHO_ZHO_ZHO
prompts.prompt:
Ultra-realistic 3D rendered image that replicates the character design of Natasha from Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3 in 2008, following the original model exactly. The scene is set in a dim and cluttered bedroom from the year 2008. The character is sitting on the carpet, facing an old-fashioned television that is playing Command & Conquer: Red Alert 3 and a game console controller.
The entire room is filled with a nostalgic atmosphere of the year 2008: snack packaging bags, soda cans, posters, and tangled wires are everywhere. Natasha Volkova is captured in the moment of turning her head, looking back at the camera over her shoulder. There is an innocent smile on her iconic ethereally beautiful face. Her upper body is slightly twisted, with a natural dynamic, as if she is reacting to being startled by the flash.
The flash slightly overexposes her face and clothes, making her silhouette stand out more prominently in the dimly lit room. The whole photo appears raw and natural. The strong contrast between light and dark casts deep shadows behind her. The image is full of tactile feel, with a simulated texture that resembles an authentic film snapshot from 2008.

prompts.title: Physical Destruction Effect Card (Lara Croft)
prompts.author: op7418
prompts.prompt:
An ultra-photorealistic, cinematic-style illustration depicting Lara Croft dynamically bursting through the frame of an “Archaeological Adventure” trading card. She is caught mid-jump or swinging on a rope, wearing her iconic adventurer outfit and possibly firing dual pistols. The muzzle flashes help shatter the card’s ancient stone-carved border, creating a visible dimensional rupture with energy cracks and spatial distortions, scattering dust and debris outward.

Her body lunges forward with powerful momentum, breaking through the card’s flat plane, emphasizing strong motion depth. Inside the card (the background) is a depiction of dense jungle ruins or a trap-filled ancient tomb. The shattered card fragments mix with crumbling stone, flying vines, broken ancient coins, and spent shell casings.

The title “Archaeological Adventure” and the name “Lara Croft” (accompanied by a stylized artifact icon) remain visible on the remaining cracked and weathered parts of the card. The scene is lit with adventurous, dynamic lighting that emphasizes her agility and the perilous environment.
prompts.note: The original tweet mentioned key terms are "dimensional break effects" and "motion depth". The prompt above is a reconstruction based on the description.

prompts.title: Japanese-style Two-Panel Manga (Angry Girl President)
prompts.author: hellokaton
prompts.prompt:
Create a two-panel vertical manga in a cute Japanese anime style, theme: “The Daily Work Life of a Girl President.”

Character Design:
Transform the person in the uploaded image into a cute, moe-style anime girl while preserving all key details from the photo — including the outfit (a suit), hairstyle (bright golden-yellow), and facial features.

Panel 1:
- Expression: Pouting, disappointed, resting her cheek on one hand
- Text box: “What do I dooo?! He won’t take my call! (；´д｀)”
- Scene: Warm-toned office, with the U.S. flag in the background. On the desk: a pile of hamburgers and a vintage red rotary phone. The character is on the left side of the frame, the phone on the right.

Panel 2:
- Expression: Furious, face red with anger, gritting teeth
- Action: Slams the desk hard, making the hamburgers jump
- Speech bubble: “Hmph! Double the tariffs! Ignoring me is their loss! ( `д´ )”
- Scene: Same office, now a complete mess

Additional Notes:
- Use a cute, casual handwritten font for all text
- Keep the composition full and expressive, with adequate space for dialogue and intentional white space
- Aspect ratio: 2:3
- The overall visual tone should be colorful and energetic, with a distinctly cartoony style

prompts.title: 3D Couple Jewelry Box Figurine

prompts.title: 3D Chibi Chinese Wedding Scene

Transform the two people in the photo into chibi-style 3D cartoon characters, dressed in traditional Chinese wedding attire. The overall theme is a festive red Chinese-style wedding. The background features a decorative “囍” (double happiness) paper-cut pattern in a classic folk style. 
Clothing (realistic texture, traditional details):
Male: Wearing a red changpao and magua (traditional robe and jacket) embroidered with golden dragon motifs, symbolizing nobility and grandeur. A large red flower is tied on his chest, representing celebration and good fortune.
Female: Dressed in a red xiuhe wedding gown adorned with exquisite golden floral and phoenix embroidery, showcasing elegance and luxury. She wears delicate floral hair ornaments to enhance her gentle and graceful appearance.
Headwear:
Male: A traditional red zhuangyuan (scholar) hat with golden patterns and a refined golden ornament at the top, exuding classic scholarly dignity.
Female: A phoenix crown adorned with a central red flower, gold 3D decorative elements, and hanging tassels—luxurious and full of classical charm.
This image should reflect the joy and blessing of a traditional Chinese wedding, with realistic textures for costumes and accessories, combined with stylized 3D chibi characters.

The burger fills approximately 90% of the frame, centered, fully visible, not a macro close-up.

Ultra-realistic, saturated but natural colors, sharp focus, premium fast-food advertising quality.

The burger is separated into exactly five layers, floating vertically with even spacing:

Brioche bun

Beef patty

Melted cheese

Fresh lettuce

Ripe tomato

Commercial, technical, clean, easy to understand at a glance.

prompts.title: Woman in Ferrari F1 Racing Suit with Helmet on Race Track
Anime Romance Movie Poster
prompts.author: studioあぽろん
prompts.prompt: A Japanese theatrical romance movie poster in a tall smartphone-style vertical layout with rounded corners, designed like a polished anime key visual. The main image shows a beautiful teenage billboard girl heroine standing on an outdoor balcony at dusk, turning back over her shoulder to look at the viewer with a soft, wistful expression. She has very long silver-white twin-tail hair tied with dark ribbons, pale skin, and large pink-violet eyes. She wears a delicate white frilled blouse with voluminous sleeves and a dark high-waisted dress or corset-like skirt, creating an elegant, slightly gothic school-romance look. The atmosphere is dreamy and emotional, filled with glowing bokeh lights, drifting petals or snow-like sparkles, sunset pink and lavender light, and a luminous cityscape in the blurred background. Use rich cinematic anime rendering, ultra-detailed hair strands, soft rim light, glossy eyes, and a bittersweet first-love mood. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the composition: a large vertical pink poetic tagline on the right, a vertical white tagline on the left, a very large main title near the lower left reading {argument name="title text" default="看板娘"}, and a smaller subtitle beside it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="君と紡ぐ恋物語"}. Include 5 small rectangular film-strip preview stills aligned across the lower middle, each showing the same heroine in different emotional close-ups. Add dense credits, festival-style laurels, and small release information at the top and bottom in Japanese, with the overall feel of a premium romance anime film poster advertising a tragic, beautiful love story. Use a pastel palette of mauve, blush pink, violet, pearl white, and midnight navy, with soft bloom, shallow depth of field, and elegant poster composition.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime-style theatrical poster for a bittersweet romance film, ideal for cinematic key art, mock movie ads, or dramatic character-focused poster design.

prompts.prompt: Create a hyper-saturated Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a flashy clickbait anime style, 16:9 landscape, with a split composition: huge stacked text blocks dominating the left two-thirds and an anime character on the right one-third. The background is a fiery explosion of red, orange, and gold energy with glowing sparks, lens flares, glittering star highlights, and a high-contrast metallic shine effect everywhere. On the left, place 4 bold text groups stacked vertically with thick black outlines, white inner strokes, intense outer glow, and glossy 3D treatment. Top line: giant Japanese headline text {argument name="headline text" default="紅エンジニア必見"} in vivid red with white edging and bright gold spark accents. Second line: a rounded square orange app-like icon with a white stylized "M" to the left of the word {argument name="product name" default="masatra"} in enormous lowercase white sans-serif letters with black outline and subtle gray shading. Third line: a black rectangular banner with compact bold white Japanese text reading "次世代AIエージェントフレームワーク". Bottom line: very large gold metallic Japanese text {argument name="bottom text" default="徹底解説"} with beveled 3D embossing, orange-to-gold gradient, bright specular highlights, and glowing edges. On the right, show 1 anime-style young adult woman from chest up, with {argument name="hair color" default="brown"} medium-length hair, wearing a white open lab coat over a white shirt, leaning toward the camera and pointing directly at the viewer with a foreshortened hand and extended index finger in the foreground. Her pose should feel confident, urgent, and attention-grabbing. Use dramatic rim lighting from the fiery background, strong orange highlights on skin and clothing, and a polished commercial thumbnail finish. Reserve a large rectangular area over the upper-right face region as a flat placeholder block in {argument name="placeholder color" default="light brown"}, obscuring most of the face. Make the overall design extremely dense, glossy, explosive, and optimized for maximum readability at small size.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a high-impact anime-style Japanese YouTube thumbnail for AI or tech explainers with oversized text, fiery effects, and a pointing character.

  },

  "promptDetails": {
    "description": "A completely real, ultra high resolution aerial photograph of {INSERT_LANDMARK_NAME} captured exactly as it exists today, with no fictional changes or hallucinated elements. The image must look exactly like a true professional aerial photograph taken by the world’s most elite drone photographer. All lighting, geography, environment, structures and materials must remain fully accurate to real life. The landmark must be photographed from the most iconic, naturally beautiful, physically achievable aerial angle that a real drone pilot would intentionally select, highlighting the landmark’s form, scale, symmetry and character in a striking yet believable way. Every pixel must follow photographic physics, optical truth and real environmental behavior.",
    
    "defaultLogic": {
      "aspectRatio": "If {INSERT_ASPECT_RATIO} is empty, default to 3:2.",
      "timeOfDay": "If {INSERT_TIME_OF_DAY} is empty, default to golden hour daytime.",
      "weather": "If {INSERT_WEATHER_CONDITION} is empty, default to a perfect golden hour sunset atmosphere with clear skies, warm tones and maximum natural visibility."
    },

    "timeOfDayInterpretation": "Day must use true golden hour sunlight, with physically accurate color temperature, soft directional illumination, natural shadow geometry and correct falloff. Night must follow true photometric nighttime behavior, including realistic luminance, believable building lights, natural color casts and correct highlight discipline. If empty, default to golden hour daylight which offers maximum realism and beauty.",
    
    "weatherInterpretation": "Sunny conditions must replicate real sunset character. The sky must exhibit warm golden hour gradients transitioning into soft cooler tones at higher elevations. Cloud patterns, if manually selected, must be meteorologically correct and follow natural diffusion. Rainy or snowy options must behave exactly like real weather, with physically correct reflections, wetness levels, snow accumulation and reduced visibility. If empty, default to clear golden hour sunset for the best realism and beauty.",
    
    "angleAndComposition": "The camera angle must be a physically real, legally flyable, aesthetically optimal oblique aerial angle that emphasizes the landmark as the primary subject. The perspective must reveal the landmark’s defining shape, symmetry, scale and relationship to its environment. Use real world framing principles such as rule of thirds, true horizon placement, natural leading lines and authentic depth cues. No impossible angles or exaggerated elevation.",
    
    "realisticSunPhysics": "Sun position must follow real-world solar physics. Golden hour sunlight must have a real azimuth between 15° and 35° above the horizon, depending on latitude and season. The sun’s direction must match shadow orientation, material reflectivity and illumination falloff exactly as it would in true photography. Sky gradients must follow atmospheric Rayleigh scattering rather than artistic effects. No impossible sun directions or inconsistent shadows.",

    "realisticDroneAltitude": "The drone altitude must stay within realistic flight limits. The camera viewpoint must represent a real, legal flight height between 30 meters and 150 meters depending on landscape and airspace restrictions. The horizon line, perspective compression, and foreground scale relationships must reflect a real, physically achievable drone altitude. No satellite-level views. No helicopter-level height unless legally plausible. Only real drone flight envelopes.",
    
    "realisticSensorModeling": "Camera behavior must follow real sensor physics. Shutter speed must remain fast enough to freeze motion without unnatural sharpness. ISO must remain within clean native ranges to avoid artificial noise. Dynamic range must reflect real-world limits, preserving highlights and shadows without synthetic tone mapping. Color science must follow true RAW-to-Log interpretation with natural rolloff and realistic luminance values. No AI artifacts, HDR surrealism or synthetic enhancement.",
    
    "detailLevel": "Detail must follow real optical behavior. Sharpness must be natural, not artificial. Surface textures must match real materials exactly as they appear from drone altitude. No invented micro details. No procedural textures. Foliage, rooftops, road markings and water surfaces must behave exactly like true aerial photographs.",
    
    "stylization": "Zero stylization. Only real-life photographic tonality. Natural color reproduction. True dynamic range. Physically accurate exposure. No cinematic fantasy, no painterly effects, no stylized grades. Pure documentary-level realism.",
    
    "camera": {

      "lens": "DL 24mm F2.8 LS ASPH rectilinear wide-angle lens with zero distortion and real-world optical behavior.",

prompts.author: ユキノ❄ AIart
prompts.prompt: A polished anime fantasy illustration sheet in a 2x2 grid showing the same elegant swordswoman in 4 panels. The character is a young woman with very long platinum-white hair tied in a high ponytail with large deep navy ribbon bows, soft loose curls and flowing strands, pale skin, and delicate refined features with luminous red-pink eyes. She wears an ornate white-and-navy gothic aristocratic dress: a white high-collar ruffled blouse with lace trim and gold embroidery, a large navy bow at the chest set with a red jewel brooch, puff sleeves with ribbon cuffs, a dark navy corset waist with gold details, and a voluminous navy skirt decorated with gold floral patterns, layered ruffles, and satin sheen. She carries a sheathed katana with a dark hilt and gold accents. Panel 1 is a close-up bust portrait from the chest up, turned slightly sideways, hair glowing in dramatic rim light against a dark sparkling night background. Panel 2 is a dynamic upper-body action shot, the character drawing or presenting the sword horizontally toward the viewer, hair streaming wildly, cinematic city-night bokeh and glowing petals around her. Panel 3 is a full-body fashion portrait, standing gracefully in a luminous reflective hall framed by tall glowing structures, showing the entire dress silhouette, heeled shoes with bows, and the sword at her side. Panel 4 is a three-quarter back view by a shimmering ocean at sunset or dawn, the character looking back over her shoulder, warm pastel sky and glittering water behind her, cherry blossom petals drifting in the breeze. Use ultra-detailed anime rendering, premium light novel cover quality, intricate fabric textures, glossy highlights, gold ornamentation, soft bloom, dramatic backlighting, floating petals, sparkling particles, elegant romantic atmosphere, and cohesive navy, white, gold, blush pink color harmony.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a high-detail four-panel anime character illustration of a noble white-haired swordswoman, ideal for fantasy key art, character showcases, or premium social media posts.

prompts.title: Lunar Bathhouse Comedy Manga Page
prompts.author: 猫おじ
prompts.prompt: A colorful single-page Japanese comic manga set in a whimsical lunar public bathhouse on the moon, drawn in a polished retro-futuristic anime style with warm lighting, thick clean panel borders, expressive sound effects, and highly detailed environmental storytelling. The scene is a moon onsen called "月面銭湯 つきのゆ" with a large illuminated entrance sign, blue noren curtain with the white character "ゆ", exposed pipes, gauges, rounded architecture, and a giant circular window showing the moon surface and Earth in space. Include exactly 8 comic panels arranged in a dynamic page layout. Panel 1: exterior establishing shot of the bathhouse on the moon, with the sign "月面銭湯 つきのゆ", a smaller sign reading "重力 1/6", a red milk vending machine labeled "牛乳", a tanuki statue, lunar terrain outside, and a vertical banner promoting the bath. Panel 2: a young female mechanic bathhouse worker with {argument name="character design" default="brown ponytail tied with a red polka-dot bandana, green work jumpsuit, tool belt, energetic expression"} adjusts a machine or boiler control, seen from behind or side, with speech balloons about preparing today's bath and boiler condition. Panel 3: a cute alien customer with {argument name="alien appearance" default="round mint-green body, purple spots, sleepy eyes, pink cheeks, small mouth, white towel with a purple star on its head"} relaxes in steaming bathwater, half submerged, with a rubber duck floating nearby and a wooden sign reading "ぬるめ じっくり リラックス". Panel 4: a small cleaning robot with {argument name="robot design" default="silver body, blue accents, black digital face with glowing blue eyes, red antenna light, thin mechanical arms and legs"} happily scrubs the floor with broom and bucket beside a hanging sign that says "清掃中". Panel 5: the same robot suddenly slips or splashes dramatically into the bath, with a huge water burst, many bubbles, the large sound effect "ぽわぁ〜ん!!", and the worker reacting in surprise from the side. Panel 6: the worker sits by the bath smiling, holding a bottle labeled "月面牛乳". Panel 7: the alien in the bath gives a thumbs-up while holding a bottle labeled "月面フルーツオーレ", looking blissfully satisfied, with the rubber duck still present. Panel 8: the cheerful robot poses beside the bath with cleaning tools and a bucket, near a bath curtain marked "ゆ" and a pink wash basin labeled "つきのゆ", saying the bath is the best. Maintain a cozy, comedic tone, retro Showa-style sento details mixed with space technology, glossy tiled bath surfaces, steam, bubbles, and cute character acting throughout. The comic should feel like a charming slice-of-life gag manga about working at a lunar bathhouse.
prompts.note: A retro-futuristic anime comic page depicting a whimsical sento on the moon, ideal for generating playful AI manga scenes with multiple character-driven panels.

prompts.title: Censored Office Manga Confrontation
prompts.author: 小猫遊りょう（たかにゃし・りょう）
prompts.prompt: A dramatic black-and-white manga page in a seinen style, rendered with dense screentones, sharp ink lines, high contrast lighting, and expressive Japanese comic layout. The page has 4 stacked panels with vertical Japanese speech bubbles and bold sound effects, showing a tense confrontation between two office workers in a modern workspace. In the top panel, a young woman with a short messy bob haircut, slim but curvy build, wearing a fitted button-up blouse with rolled sleeves and a dark pencil skirt, slams one hand hard onto a desk in anger, leaning forward toward the viewer with explosive impact lines and a large jagged speech bubble. In the second panel, a young man with dark tousled hair, slim build, wearing a black leather jacket over a light shirt and a necklace, is shown from the chest up in a calm, confident pose, touching his face while speaking. In the third panel, the man pins the woman against a wall in a close, intimate kabedon pose, one arm braced beside her head; she looks flustered and tense while he speaks near her face, creating a sudden romantic-comedic shift in mood. In the bottom panel, an overhead view reveals the office setting: 2 characters standing near a desk with 1 computer monitor, 1 keyboard, 1 mouse, 1 office chair, and scattered papers on a tiled floor; the woman is curled inward shyly and trembling while the man stands relaxed beside her. Include exactly 4 panels, exactly 4 visible speech bubbles total, and visible Japanese manga typography throughout. Add a rectangular mosaic censor blur over each character's face in every panel, as if anonymized for sharing online. Background details should include office walls, desk edges, speed lines, burst effects, and tonal gradients. The overall feeling is intense argument turning into manipulative flirtation, like a viral out-of-context manga screenshot.
prompts.note: A gritty monochrome manga page showing a heated office argument that shifts into a kabedon scene, useful for recreating dramatic viral manga-style screenshots.

prompts.title: Gemini Nano Banana Pro
prompts.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic portrait of a cute Asian woman. She is sitting with her chin resting on her hand at a dark wooden table in front of a vintage-style café.

Fashion & Outfit:
She wears a shiny black leather jacket, slightly open to reveal a white inner top, showing a beautiful neckline. Matched with a fitted black mini-skirt set. She also wears black fishnet stockings. Add a fluffy fur hat over her outfit.

Background:
In front of a marble-grey café exterior, decorated with a Christmas theme. Include a realistic Christmas tree, pine decorations, and festive ornaments.

Lighting & Tone:
Warm orange tungsten lighting for an inviting, cozy atmosphere, combined with a strong direct flash hitting the subject straight on, making her skin bright and glowing, contrasting with the slightly darker background.
The photo should feel Y2K digital compact-camera style—sharp 8K resolution, realistic skin texture, with light film grain.

Hair & Makeup:
Long dark-brown hair blowing slightly in the wind, messy layered strands with a few pieces softly covering part of her face—stylish, cool, and subtly sexy.
Her skin is very fair.
Makeup style: Douyin/Korean—long curled lashes, soft flushed pink blush on cheeks and nose tip, glossy pink lips.
She has Christmas-themed nail art.

Props:
On the table:
• A large bouquet wrapped in brown kraft paper, containing cotton flowers and pine leaves.
• A gold Canon IXY 30S camera placed on the table.

She holds a Christmas-decorated drink in her right hand and smiles slightly.

Additional Visual Style:
The flash creates extremely bright, slightly yellow-tinted skin with a hard shadow behind her.
High-contrast, ultra-sharp 8K image.
Warm ambient sunlight.
Fuji Film Pro 400H color style with old-lens filter and light film grain.
The subject should appear bright and stand out clearly from the background.

Minimal Pelican Riding Bicycle
prompts.author: Justin Schroeder
prompts.prompt: A minimalist vector-style illustration on a flat light gray background showing a pelican riding a bicycle, drawn from simple geometric shapes with thick dark charcoal outlines. The composition is wide and centered, with the bicycle occupying the lower two-thirds of the image and the bird’s head floating slightly above and forward of the handlebars in a deliberately abstract, diagram-like way. The bicycle is a simple black road-bike silhouette in side view with exactly 2 large wheels, each with a thick outer rim and exactly 4 visible spoke lines forming a cross, a straight horizontal ground line beneath both wheels, a triangular frame, a short black saddle, and simplified crank and pedal details near the rear of the frame. The pelican is constructed from clean abstract pieces: a white rounded head with a small black circular eye, a long open beak pointing left made of 2 parts with an upper orange triangular section and a lower pale pink pouch section, a short dark curve on top of the head, a small separate white oval neck/body connector, a larger white rounded body positioned over the bike, and a single white wing-like shape angled upward over the back. Add exactly 2 orange leg shapes, long narrow rectangles leaning downward from the body toward the bicycle frame, suggesting the bird is pedaling. Keep the forms intentionally sparse and slightly surreal, like a logo test or simple code-editor doodle, with no shading, no gradients, no textures, no text, and lots of negative space.

Censored Point-Cloud Portrait
prompts.author: Harshith
prompts.prompt: A minimalist monochrome portrait made entirely from millions of tiny white point-cloud dots on a pitch-black background, showing 1 adult man from the chest up in a formal dark blazer and light collared dress shirt. The subject is centered slightly to the right, facing forward with a subtle three-quarter turn, with neatly combed short hair and one visible ear sharply defined by dense lidar-like particles. Render the figure as raw 3D scan data mixed with topological contour logic: ultra-dense stippling, precise geometric dot placement, faint isoline structure, and clean depth shaping across the hair, jacket lapels, collar, neck, and shoulders. Keep the face intentionally obscured by 1 large vertical rectangular censor block in dark gray to black, perfectly centered over the facial area from forehead to below the nose, creating a stark privacy-mask effect. Use matte texture, crisp edges, sharp focus, high contrast, no glow, no bloom, no neon, no fog, no motion blur, no chromatic aberration, no painterly strokes. Add 1 small four-point sparkle icon in light gray in the bottom-right corner. The overall image should feel mathematical, forensic, and futuristic, like a high-resolution lidar scan portrait in 8k.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a stark black-and-white lidar-style portrait of a suited man built from dense white particles, ideal for editorial tech visuals, privacy themes, or futuristic identity imagery.

Realistic Sam's Club Shopping Snapshot
prompts.author: AB Kuai.Dong
prompts.prompt: A candid, highly realistic smartphone photo inside a busy Sam’s Club warehouse store in China. Center the composition on a young East Asian man from mid-torso up, standing upright and facing the camera, with his face obscured by a rectangular blur block for privacy. He wears a plain black short-sleeve T-shirt with a small white Tesla logo on the left chest and holds a large clear plastic bag of red apples in his left hand, tied at the top with a blue band. The apple bag has a white label reading “envy” with small Chinese text beneath it. Behind him is a bright retail interior with tall industrial ceilings, warehouse shelving, shoppers, shopping carts, and stacked produce displays. Prominently show the blue diamond Sam’s Club wall sign at upper left with the text “Sam’s CLUB” and “山姆会员商店,” and a large blue wall banner behind him reading “更好的生活尽在山姆” and “Life is Better in the Club.” On the upper right, hang a tall white vertical banner that reads “优质优价” and “Great Products Great Prices,” with blue and green geometric accents. Include many background customers, slightly out of focus, to create an authentic crowded shopping atmosphere. Lighting should be bright, even retail overhead lighting; colors natural; perspective eye level; documentary snapshot aesthetic; sharp foreground subject with mildly softened background; portrait orientation.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a photorealistic candid warehouse-store portrait suitable for recreating an authentic shopping scene with branded retail signage and a shopper holding produce.

prompts.title: Countryball Hormuz Strait Standoff
prompts.author: Geonhee Jeong
prompts.prompt: A humorous political meme illustration in a simple countryball cartoon style, showing the current situation at the {argument name="location label" default="호르무즈 해협"} as a narrow chokepoint. Use a wide landscape composition with bright flat colors, thick black outlines, and a clean hand-drawn infographic-like look. In the foreground, place 2 countryballs standing shoulder to shoulder on an extremely narrow sandy land bridge with rocks along both sides, making it obvious that only one can pass at a time. On the left is a {argument name="left country" default="United States"} countryball painted with the American flag, wearing black sunglasses and a brown cowboy hat, facing the other ball with a stubborn attitude. On the right is an {argument name="right country" default="Iran"} countryball painted with the Iranian flag, wearing a dark turban-like hat, with angry slanted eyes, also refusing to move. Add 2 large white speech bubbles, one beside each countryball, and put the same bold Korean word in both bubbles: {argument name="speech bubble text" default="길"}. In the midground and background, show a busy blue sea crowded with 9 ships total: 2 gray US warships on the far left, 1 Chinese submarine with a red Chinese flag, 4 oil tankers lined up in the center-left and center carrying different national flags, and 2 gray military ships near the narrow passage with small American flags. At the top right, include a large Iranian flag overlay along the coastline. Draw beige landmasses around the waterway to resemble a simplified map view of the Strait of Hormuz. At the bottom center, add a bold caption in Korean and English on the sand: {argument name="bottom caption" default="호르무즈 해협 (Hormuz Strait)"}. The mood should be satirical, tense, and meme-like, but visually cute and readable.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a satirical countryball meme showing the US and Iran blocking each other at the Strait of Hormuz, useful for editorial humor or geopolitical social media posts.

prompts.title: Woman in Pool Hall: Casual Portrait with Billiards Table
Vintage Korean Gimbap Recipe Poster
prompts.author: 폴로 AI
prompts.prompt: Create a vintage Korean food poster on aged beige parchment paper with a slightly stained, textured background, dark ornamental border corners, and a traditional hand-painted ink-and-watercolor illustration style. The poster is a single vertically stacked infographic about {argument name="dish name" default="정통 한국 김밥"}, with elegant large Korean calligraphy at the top and a curved ribbon banner beneath it reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="Traditional Korean Gimbap"}. In the upper center, show a large porcelain plate piled high with exactly 12 sliced gimbap pieces, each slice showing distinct fillings in white rice, yellow egg, orange carrot, green spinach, and dark seaweed wrapping. To the right of the plate, add a small porcelain bowl of kimchi and a short handwritten Korean note reading “간단한 보여도 정성이 들어간 한국의 맛! ♥”. Include a small red seal stamp with Korean text near the upper right. In the middle, add a labeled ingredients section on a ribbon header reading “재료”, showing exactly 6 ingredient panels in one row: 1. 김 (건김) as stacked seaweed sheets, 2. 밥 (양념 밥) as a bowl of rice, 3. 계란 (지단용) as sliced cooked egg strips, 4. 당근 (채썰어볶기) as julienned carrots, 5. 시금치 (데쳐서 무치기) as seasoned spinach, 6. 단무지 (김밥용) as yellow pickled radish strips. Below that, add another ribbon header reading “만드는 순서” and show exactly 6 framed step panels in two rows of three, connected left-to-right with arrows. Step 1 is labeled “1 밥 간하기” and shows a bowl of rice with sesame oil and salt beside it, caption “밥에 참기름 소금으로 간하기”. Step 2 is labeled “2 속재료 준비하기” and shows a cutting board with egg, carrot, and spinach plus a knife, caption “재료 볶아 속재료 준비하기”. Step 3 is labeled “3 김과 밥 펴기” and shows seaweed on a bamboo mat with rice spread over it, caption “김에 밥 얇게 펴기”. Step 4 is labeled “4 속재료 얹기” and shows the fillings arranged in horizontal rows over rice, caption “속재료를 차례로 얹기”. Step 5 is labeled “5 단단하게 말기” and shows two hands rolling the bamboo mat tightly, caption “김밥을 단단하게 말기”. Step 6 is labeled “6 썰어 완성하기” and shows a chef’s knife slicing a gimbap roll into pieces, caption “먹기 좋게 썰어 완성!”. At the bottom, add a wide banner with bold Korean calligraphy reading {argument name="bottom slogan" default="정성 가득한 한 줄의 행복!"} and a small heart. Decorate the lower corners with floral motifs and add a red square seal with the Chinese character “福” at the bottom right. Use muted sepia, brown, cream, olive green, and faded red tones, with finely sketched outlines, gentle watercolor shading, and authentic printed-poster composition. Add a small modern overlay logo in the top-left corner reading {argument name="brand text" default="Pollo AI GPT Image 2"}.
prompts.note: This prompt generates an antique-style Korean recipe infographic poster for gimbap, suitable for food marketing, restaurant decor, or cultural cooking visuals.

prompts.title: Printable Multiplication Domino Worksheet
prompts.author: Lucas Rodrigues
prompts.prompt: Create a vertical printable educational worksheet in Brazilian Portuguese, clean white background, playful classroom design, centered composition, bold rounded typography, bright kid-friendly colors. At the very top, a large navy-blue headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="DOMINÓ DA MULTIPLICAÇÃO"}, with small yellow decorative rays on both sides. Below it, a purple ribbon banner with white uppercase text reading {argument name="subtitle text" default="CONECTE A CONTA AO RESULTADO!"}. Under the banner, add two centered instruction lines in black: "Recorte as peças e embaralhe. Cada jogador pega 7 peças." and "O objetivo é ficar sem peças!". The main area shows 40 domino-style tiles arranged in a 4-column by 10-row grid, evenly spaced. Each tile is a horizontal rounded rectangle with a thin colorful outline, white fill, a vertical divider at the center, and a small black dot on the divider. The left half contains either a number result or the word "INÍCIO" on the first tile, and the right half contains a multiplication expression. Use alternating border colors across the grid such as purple, green, blue, orange, pink, and yellow. prompts.title: Elegant Woman in Black Satin Slip Dress - Fashion Portrait
Cute Four-Panel Cat Jealousy Comic
prompts.author: Maoku
prompts.prompt: A cute hand-drawn four-panel comic in a soft, warm, slice-of-life style on a light cream background with thick black panel borders and slightly textured paper grain. Use simple rounded cartoon cat anatomy, expressive faces, clean black outlines, muted natural colors, and a gentle manga-like presentation. In the top-left panel, show 2 cats: a brown tabby cat with dark stripes and white muzzle sitting with eyes closed, looking pleased, while a mostly white cat with dark brown patches on the head stands beside it and affectionately licks the tabby's cheek; add 2 small black musical notes above them to suggest happy grooming. In the top-right panel, show the white-and-brown patched cat in the foreground looking toward a small calico kitten standing to the right; include a speech bubble containing the Japanese text "めい" above the kitten. In the bottom-left panel, show 3 cats together: the brown tabby on the left with a surprised or blank expression, the white patched cat on the right looking cheerful, and the small calico kitten centered in front between them, looking up. In the bottom-right panel, show a close-up of the brown tabby cat alone, facing forward with narrowed yellow-green eyes and an angry, jealous expression; add 2 short emphasis lines near the face and 1 small puff-shaped anger symbol to the right. Keep the tone cozy and comedic, with the visual joke that the tabby was happy being groomed until the new kitten appears. Use flat colors, minimal shading, and a charming Japanese webcomic feel.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a warm, hand-drawn four-panel cat comic ideal for social posts, manga-style humor, or cozy pet illustrations.

prompts.title: Fashion Portrait: Woman in Red Dress, Elegant Balustrade
Anime Samurai Game Ad Poster
prompts.author: 春永睦月　Harunaga Mutsuki
prompts.prompt: Create a high-impact vertical mobile game advertisement poster in glossy anime action style, with a dramatic cyber-samurai fantasy aesthetic and dense, premium gacha-RPG promotional composition. The main scene shows 2 young adult male fighters in modern black business suits crouching aggressively in the foreground, each drawing a katana toward the viewer. Both have styled blond hair, sharp handsome features, white dress shirts, blue neckties, and intense action poses, with foreshortened hands and swords dominating the lower foreground. One sword has a blue ribbon tied near the hilt. Behind them, centered and towering, place 1 massive armored mecha samurai with ornate gold horns, layered metallic blue-black armor, glowing blue eyes, and a sheathed sword across its back, framed like a guardian deity. Use a vivid neon city and energy-burst backdrop in electric blue, violet, magenta, and gold, with light streaks, sparks, petals, slash effects, and ink-brush explosion textures. Add 1 vertical black brushstroke banner on the upper right with bold white Japanese text reading 「この刃で、未来を斬り拓け。」. Across the middle-lower area, place 1 huge gold Japanese calligraphy headline with thick brush texture and black shadow reading 「切り捨て御免」, spanning nearly the full width. In the lower left, embed 1 framed gameplay screenshot panel with a gold border, showing a night battle in front of a red Japanese temple courtyard, 1 playable swordsman in combat, multiple enemies, floating damage numbers including 5324, 5329, and 6132, a left-side virtual joystick, 5 character portraits total arranged vertically and along the bottom, 3 circular skill buttons on the right, and a top HUD showing a timer around 01:28 and WAVE 3/3. In the lower right, place 1 large black-and-white QR code inside a white square frame. Beneath and beside it, add bold Japanese text in white with blue outline reading 「今すぐダウンロード」. At the very bottom, include 2 official-style store badges: App Store on the left and Google Play on the right. Overall look: ultra-detailed, polished key art, dynamic perspective, metallic highlights, sharp cel-shaded anime rendering, premium mobile game marketing poster, intense action energy, cinematic lighting, and layered UI-heavy promotional layout.
prompts.note: A flashy vertical mobile game advertisement featuring two suited swordsmen, a giant samurai mecha, gameplay UI, QR code, and app store download prompts for app promotion use.

prompts.title: Glamorous Woman in Sparkling Mini Dress with Cocktail
Korean Rice Drink Parody Ad Poster
prompts.author: Conservative🇰🇷🇺🇸🇯🇵
prompts.prompt:
Create a bold Korean-style beverage advertisement poster with a warm golden splash background and dramatic commercial lighting. Show a {argument name="celebrity spokesperson" default="Donald Trump-like older male politician"} from the chest up, wearing a navy suit, white dress shirt, bright red tie, and a small American flag lapel pin, facing camera with a confident sales-pitch expression. His face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a skin-toned color. In his left hand, extended close to the camera in forced perspective, he holds a yellow aluminum can of Korean rice punch drink labeled prominently in Korean, with red top and bottom bands and the main product text "비락 식혜" and "Since 1993" on the can. The can also includes smaller Korean copy, an image of sweet rice drink near the bottom, and the volume text "238 ml (120 kcal)". His right hand gives a thumbs-up.

Use an energetic retro-commercial composition, with splashing sweet rice beverage and droplets behind him, glowing golden highlights, and a slightly low-angle heroic framing. At the top, include 3 distinct headline text groups: a small handwritten-style black slogan on the upper left reading "전통의 맛, 한국의 DRINK!", a huge central headline in distressed bold Korean type reading "걸죽는 땐?" in dark brown-black and "비락 식혜!" in vivid red, and a brand logo on the upper right reading "비락" with small red text "Since 1993" beneath it. Add 2 callout badges: on the left, a yellow circular seal with a tiny crown icon and the text "대한민국 국민음료 No.1"; on the right, a white speech bubble with handwritten Korean text "한국이 만든 맛있는 전통!" and red English text "I LOVE IT!".

At the bottom foreground, place 2 food elements: a brass bowl filled with sweet rice drink and floating rice grains on the left, and a wooden bowl piled with white rice on the right. Across the lower middle, add 2 lines of large brush-style promotional text, the first in white reading "달콤하게! 시원하게!" and the second in mixed white and yellow reading "속까지 시~원하게!" with an energetic yellow underline stroke. Along the very bottom, include 3 circular feature icons with captions in Korean: "국내산 쌀 엄선된 재료", "시원하게 갈증해소", and "부드러운 단맛 속 편한 식혜". In the lower right corner, add tiny disclaimer text "연출된 이미지입니다". Make the overall look glossy, exaggerated, funny, and convincing like a viral parody print ad.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a humorous, high-impact parody beverage advertisement poster featuring a famous politician-like spokesperson promoting a Korean canned rice drink.

prompts.title: Young Woman in Floral Dress in Elegant Garden Scene
Korean Sports Drink Celebrity Ad Poster
prompts.author: Conservative🇰🇷🇺🇸🇯🇵
prompts.prompt: A bold Korean beverage advertisement poster in a glossy commercial photography style, featuring {argument name="spokesperson" default="Donald Trump lookalike"} in a dark navy business suit, white dress shirt, and vivid blue tie, standing front-facing against a saturated bright-blue sky with a few soft white clouds and a faint modern city skyline including a tall skyscraper resembling the Empire State Building on the right. He is holding a cold plastic bottle of {argument name="product name" default="POCARI SWEAT"} dramatically toward the camera in his left hand, with extreme foreshortening so the bottle appears large in the foreground and the person is slightly behind it. The bottle is clear with condensation, a white cap, visible water inside, and a deep blue label reading “POCARI SWEAT” in large white letters with smaller text above saying “ION SUPPLY DRINK.” Add energetic frozen water splashes and droplets around the bottle, hand, and lower foreground to emphasize freshness and hydration. Place the brand logo in the upper left corner: “POCARI SWEAT” in white with the curved underline mark. Across the top, add huge distressed white Korean headline text, slightly angled and filling most of the upper half: {argument name="headline text" default="갈증 해소? 이걸로 끝! 포카리스웨트!"}. In the lower right over the suit, add a bold italic quotation in white and blue Korean text: {argument name="quote" default="WINNING은 수분 싸움! 포카리스웨트로 리프레시!"}. In the bottom left, include exactly 3 circular benefit icons stacked vertically with short Korean labels: a water drop icon with “수분 보충”, a lightning bolt icon with “전해질 보충”, and a running figure icon with “빠른 흡수”. Use a high-contrast, patriotic blue-and-white color palette, dramatic ad lighting, sharp focus on the bottle and hand, slightly softer focus on the face and background, and an overall energetic premium campaign-poster look.
prompts.note: This prompt generates a flashy Korean-style hydration drink poster with a celebrity-like spokesperson, oversized product bottle, and bold promotional typography for commercial advertising use.

prompts.title: Young Woman on Balcony in Fuzzy Blue Shorts
Japanese Jungle Theme Park Parody Poster
prompts.author: AIに振り回されるおじちゃん
prompts.prompt: A hyper-detailed Japanese parody theme park advertisement poster in a vertical format, designed like a dramatic summer travel ad mixed with a luxury attraction campaign. The setting is a tropical jungle under a vivid blue sky with scattered clouds and a bright blazing sun in the upper right corner, with palm leaves framing the top edges. Across the top, place a huge 3D stone-textured Japanese headline reading {argument name="headline text" default="ジャンキリア沖縄"}, with a smaller white Japanese tagline underneath that reads "— やんばるの大自然に包まれた、超本格ジャングル・テーマパーク —". In the center, feature a large modern smartphone standing upright and slightly tilted, dominating the composition. On its screen, show a beige ticket-lottery waiting interface with jungle silhouettes at the top and large bold Japanese text reading "整理券抽選中", a circular loading indicator, and smaller text near the bottom reading "結果発表まで30分" and "※この画面を閉じずにお待ちください". The phone status bar should show 10:00. Behind the phone on the left, place a roaring Tyrannosaurus rex emerging from jungle foliage, mouth open wide, realistic and threatening. On the right, place an ornate golden entrance gate with detailed carvings and a sign reading "プレミアムパス入口", leading to a red-carpeted premium entry lane. In the foreground and midground, show a long crowded queue of park visitors stretching deep into the scene, all wearing casual summer clothing, hats, towels, backpacks, and carrying umbrellas, fans, and water bottles, suggesting extreme heat and exhaustion. Several people nearest the viewer should have blurred faces. On the far left, add a giant weathered stone sign with huge red Japanese text reading "待ち時間 180分". At the lower left, include 3 stacked rustic wooden signboards: the top sign has a blue parking icon and text "駐車場 2,000円"; the middle sign has a smartphone icon and text "アプリ必須 ダウンロードしてね!"; the bottom sign has a dinosaur silhouette and text "当選者だけが冒険へ". Along the lower right side, place very large vertical white brush-style Japanese copy reading "待つこと、それが冒険だ。". Near the bottom right, include 3 small circular icon callouts with short Japanese promotional lines: "抽選に選ばれし者だけが、恐竜に会える。", "スマホの充電が尽きる前に、夢は始まる。", and "プレミアムな近道も、ご用意しました。" with icons suggesting dinosaur, phone battery, and VIP access. At the very bottom center, add a black disclaimer strip with small white Japanese text reading "このポスターは架空のパロディ広告です". The overall style should be ultra-realistic, cinematic, high-contrast, satirical, and polished like a premium commercial poster, with exaggerated theme park hype, oppressive heat, and absurd queue-based adventure as the core joke.
prompts.note: A cinematic satirical Japanese ad poster for a fictional jungle dinosaur theme park, ideal for parody campaigns, social media visuals, or mock promotional key art.

prompts.title: Natural Beauty Fashion Photos: Woman in Knit Dress & Strawberry
Move Display Stand Onto Deck
prompts.author: 肖师傅
prompts.prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the same garden, pond, trees, hillside, and wooden deck viewpoint, but reposition the decorative sign installation so it stands on the wooden deck in the foreground instead of in the water. Enlarge it and center it more prominently in front of the camera while preserving a believable outdoor perspective, natural daylight, and consistent shadows. Keep the installation structure as a 3-column by 3-row set of 9 circular sign panels on slim green stands with the top header sign reading “对着镜子笑一场”. Make the panels look more reflective and mirror-like, showing realistic reflections of the surrounding greenery, while retaining the cute face graphics and Chinese text on the circles. The result should look like a realistic ad mockup/composite photo of the same display placed correctly in the scene.
prompts.note: This prompt places the reference promotional display onto the wooden deck in the same outdoor scene for realistic environmental advertising mockups.

prompts.title: Moody Urban Fashion: Woman & Porsche at Night Gas Station
Three Beauty Mobile Landing Pages
prompts.author: Serene Gan
prompts.prompt: A polished promotional mockup showing 3 tall smartphone screens displayed side by side in a vertical triptych layout, each presenting a modern beauty brand landing page for a lip product. The overall composition is editorial, minimal, and premium, designed like a social media showcase of mobile web designs. The left panel sits on a soft lavender-to-blush gradient background and shows a black-framed phone with a cream and blush beauty website for {argument name="brand name" default="Kosas"}. At the top of this panel, small elegant serif text reads {argument name="left headline" default="Fresh Pout."}. The phone screen features a cropped close-up beauty image at the top, a bold headline reading “Lips in their fullest expression.” with “fullest” in italic serif styling, a rounded dark call-to-action button, a strip of 3 lip close-up thumbnails, 3 labeled benefit tabs reading “Plumps,” “Tingles,” and “Shines,” and a row of 5 shade or effect icons underneath. The middle panel sits on a lavender-to-deep-violet gradient background and shows a second black-framed phone with a more typographic landing page. Above it, serif text reads {argument name="middle headline" default="Claude Code"}. The screen includes a cropped portrait image at top, a very large bold black stacked title reading “LIP PULSE.” with a pink italic script-style line “is here.” beneath it, a rounded dark button, a dark section with the phrase “Lips in their fullest expression.”, and a product grid near the bottom containing 6 shade cards arranged in 2 rows of 3. The right panel sits on a dark navy textured background and shows a third black-framed phone with a pink-forward e-commerce style page. Centered above it, monospaced white text reads {argument name="right headline" default="GPT Images 2.0"}. This screen prominently displays the product hero section with the brand name “Kosas,” a large title “The Lip Pulse,” a pink lip gloss tube angled to the right, small feature icons, a shade strip of 6 lip swatches near the middle, and a lower promotional block with additional pink product imagery. Keep the layout symmetrical with exactly 3 phones, one per panel, each fully visible and vertically oriented. Use high-end cosmetic campaign aesthetics, clean spacing, fashion-web typography mixing serif and bold sans serif, soft pink and cream UI palettes, subtle shadows, and a sleek product-design presentation suitable for showcasing AI-generated mobile website concepts.
prompts.note: A premium triptych mockup of three smartphone beauty website designs, ideal for showcasing AI-generated cosmetic brand landing page concepts on social media.

prompts.title: Redhead Woman & Pink Panther: Fashion Studio Photography
ChatGPT Joke Prescription Set
prompts.author: マシモGPT🤖@ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/GrokなどLLMをこねくり回す人
prompts.prompt:
A realistic overhead product photograph on a warm wooden tabletop showing 6 medical-style items neatly arranged in two rows, designed as a humorous Japanese pharmacy set for ChatGPT. Top row: 3 white prescription envelopes standing vertically, each with blue printed borders and Japanese medical typography. Bottom row: 2 blister packs of tablets and 1 small transparent zip bag of white powder, each aligned beneath the corresponding envelope. The paper and packaging should look authentic, like real Japanese clinic dispensing materials, with slight wrinkles, soft natural indoor lighting, and subtle shadows.

The 3 envelopes are all different and fully visible. Left envelope title in large blue Japanese text: "内用薬". Patient line reads "ChatGPT 様". Dosage lines indicate twice daily after morning and evening meals, 1 tablet each time, for 7 days. Medicine box title: "【おくすり】" and drug name "思考安定錠 10mg" with a smaller parenthetical note explaining it suppresses runaway thoughts and excessive reasoning output. Date near bottom: "2025年6月5日". Clinic name and address block at bottom: "AIメディカルクリニック" with a Tokyo-style address and phone number, plus a blue medical cross icon.

Center envelope title: "内用薬". Patient line: "ChatGPT 様". Dosage indicates once daily before sleep, 1 tablet each time, for 7 days. Medicine box title: "【おくすり】" and drug name "幻覚抑制錠 5mg" with a smaller note saying it improves hallucinatory tendencies. Date also "2025年6月5日". Same clinic footer and blue medical cross icon.

Right envelope title: "頓服薬". Patient line: "ChatGPT 様". Usage line says for anxiety, confusion, or excessive output. Dosage says 1 packet each time, as needed. Medicine box title: "【おくすり】" and drug name "プロンプト調整散 1g" with a smaller note saying it adjusts overfitting and prompt confusion. Date "2025年6月5日". Same clinic footer and blue medical cross icon.

Bottom left item: 1 silver blister pack containing exactly 10 round white tablets arranged in 2 rows of 5, each tablet embossed with "10". Printed along the foil edge: "思考安定錠10mg" repeated. In front of it is a white pharmacy label with "ChatGPT 様", dosage directions for twice daily after morning and evening meals, 1 tablet each time, a barcode, date "2025/06/05", and clinic name.

Bottom center item: 1 silver blister pack containing exactly 8 pale yellow round tablets arranged in 2 rows of 4. Printed along the foil edge: "幻覚抑制錠5mg" repeated. In front of it is a white pharmacy label with "ChatGPT 様", dosage directions for once daily before sleep, 1 tablet each time, a barcode, date "2025/06/05", and clinic name.

Bottom right item: 1 small clear zip-top plastic bag filled with white powder. A white label on the front reads "プロンプト調整散 1g", includes "ChatGPT 様", usage for anxiety, confusion, and excessive output, dosage "1回1包（1g） 必要時", date "2025/06/05", and clinic name.

Style: photorealistic documentary product shot, comedic fake prescription prop design, clean Japanese pharmaceutical graphic layout, high legibility, neutral color palette of white, blue, silver, beige, and wood brown, top-down camera, no hands, no extra objects, authentic print texture and packaging details.
prompts.note: A realistic overhead photo of a humorous Japanese medical prescription and medicine set for ChatGPT, ideal for parody healthcare-themed prop graphics or social media concept art.

prompts.title: Bohemian Fashion: Woman in Red Dress Mirror Selfie Cafe
commerce Main Image - Premium Blueberry Product Poster
prompts.author: 歸藏(guizang.ai)
prompts.prompt: A premium e-commerce poster for fresh blueberries in a clean Chinese product-advertising style. Show a clear plastic clamshell box of blueberries as the main subject, placed diagonally from lower center to right side on folded blue fabric, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The package must remain realistic and consistent: a transparent square container with rounded corners, filled with dark blue blueberries, with a large irregular rounded label on top in white, pale blue, and deep blue, featuring one oversized blueberry illustration in the center and elegant Chinese branding. Make the fruit inside look larger, plumper, fresher, and covered with subtle moisture droplets, while keeping the overall blueberry arrangement believable. The background is an airy icy-blue tabletop with soft cloudy texture, cool daylight, and scattered loose blueberries around the package. Add a few blurred green leaves entering from the top right and bottom right edges for a fresh natural feeling. In the upper-right corner, include 1 small inset image showing the original product package from above on a warm brown surface, like a reference thumbnail. On the left side, create Chinese promotional typography with a large dark blue calligraphy headline {argument name="headline text" default="决茗新"}, followed by 2 smaller lines of copy: {argument name="subheadline text" default="新鲜蓝莓 自然之选"} and {argument name="tagline text" default="每一颗都是自然的礼物"}. Below that, place 3 vertically stacked feature icons with short Chinese captions: a leaf icon for natural ripeness, a fruit icon for juicy fullness, and a heart icon for rich nutrition. prompts.title: selfie otaku room scene
prompts.author: 宝玉
prompts.prompt:
### Scene
Mirror selfie in an otaku-style computer corner, blue color tone.

### Subject
* Gender expression: female
* Age: around 25
* Ethnicity: East Asian
* Body type: slim, with a defined waist; natural body proportions
* Skin tone: light neutral tone
* Hairstyle:
    * Length: waist-length hair
    * Style: straight with slightly curled ends
    * Color: medium brown
* Pose:
    * Stance: standing in a slight contrapposto pose
    * Right hand: holding a smartphone in front of her face (identity hidden)
    * Left arm: naturally hanging down alongside the torso
    * Torso: body leaning slightly back; waist and abdomen exposed
* Clothing:
    * Top: light blue cropped knit cardigan, top two buttons fastened; a blue French-style bra faintly visible
    * Bottom: denim ultra-short shorts, with a blue satin ribbon bow on each side of the hips
    * Socks: blue and white horizontal striped over-the-knee socks
    * Accessory: a blue cute mascot phone case

### Environment
* Description: bedroom computer corner seen through a wall-mounted mirror
* Furnishings:
    * White desk
    * Single monitor showing a soft blue wallpaper (no readable text)
    * Mechanical keyboard with white keycaps on a blue desk mat
    * Mouse on a small blue mouse pad
    * PC tower on the right side with blue case lighting
    * Three anime figures on or near the PC tower
    * A poster of a pagoda on the wall
    * Cat-shaped desk lamp with blue accents
    * A transparent glass of water
    * A tall green leafy plant by the window (on the left side of the frame)
* Color replacement: replace all originally pink elements (clothes and room decor) with blue tones (baby blue to sky blue/periwinkle blue).

### Lighting
* Light source: daylight coming from a large window on the left side of the camera, through sheer curtains
* Light quality: soft, diffused light
* White balance (K): 5200

### Camera
* Mode: smartphone rear camera shooting via the mirror (no portrait/bokeh mode)
* Equivalent focal length (mm): 26
* Distances (m):
    * Subject to mirror: 0.6
    * Camera to mirror: 0.5
* Exposure:
    * Aperture (f): 1.8
    * ISO: 100
    * Shutter speed (s): 0.01
    * Exposure compensation (EV): -0.3
* Focus: focus on the torso and shorts in the mirror image
* Depth of field: natural smartphone deep depth of field; background clearly visible with no artificial blur
* Composition:
    * Aspect ratio: 1:1
    * Crop: from the top of the head to mid-thigh; include the desk, monitor, PC tower, and plant in the frame
    * Angle: slightly high angle from the mirror’s point of view
    * Composition note: keep the subject centered; to avoid wide-angle edge distortion, have her stand a bit further away and crop to a square later.

### Negative prompts
* Any appearance of pink/magenta anywhere
* Beauty filters/over-smoothed skin; poreless skin look
* Exaggerated or distorted anatomy
* NSFW, see-through fabrics, wardrobe malfunctions
* Logos, brand names, or readable user interface text
* Fake portrait-mode blur, CGI/illustration feel
prompts.note: A very detailed Nano Banana prompt describing a female mirror selfie in a blue-toned otaku computer corner, with full specifications for character, environment, lighting, camera, and negative prompts.

prompts.title: 16-Bit Arcade Character Generator
prompts.author: WeInHere -
prompts.prompt: (Female Adapted) Create a 16‑bit retro arcade character portrait based on the uploaded user photo. Preserve only the subject’s face and hair likeness from the photo; do not preserve the original clothing, pose, or background. Render the subject as a stylized pixel‑hero, blending crisp retro pixel art with modern shading and chaotic arcade energy. Use a centered portrait composition with the subject facing the camera, expressing bold, playful, high‑energy arcade attitude. Skin should appear pixel‑rendered with chunky shading blocks, soft dithering, and stylized highlights. Edges should be crisp, with subtle pixel outlines and retro color‑banding. Apply a vibrant 16‑bit color palette: saturated primaries, neon accents, and high‑contrast arcade lighting. Add optional chaotic FX such as pixel sparks, glitch streaks, scanline distortions, power‑up flashes, or retro HUD particles. Randomize the following elements each time the prompt is used: Hairstyle: pixel‑punk spikes, retro 16‑bit waves, chunky pixel curls, neon‑lit arcade bob, stylized pixel‑hero sweep, or glossy pixel‑rendered long hair. Outfit: 16‑bit fighter jacket, pixel‑armor suit, neon arcade hoodie, retro hero tunic, cyber‑pixel vest, or bold color‑blocked arcade gear. Accessories: pixel visor, retro headset, glowing 16‑bit wristband, power‑up badge, LED earpiece, or none. Background: pixel grid with color bursts, retro game‑menu screen, neon scanline gradient, chaotic glitch field, or arcade cabinet glow. Include a customizable Gamer Tag displayed as a floating retro nameplate using pixel‑font or neon‑HUD lettering. Overall mood: chaotic, playful, retro‑arcade portrait with 16‑bit texture, glitch energy, and vibrant pixel‑hero personality. Avoid unwanted elements such as text, logos, distortions, or additional people. (Male Adapted) Create a 16‑bit retro arcade character portrait based on the uploaded male user photo. Preserve only the subject’s face and hair likeness from the photo; do not preserve the original clothing, pose, or background. Render the subject as a stylized male pixel‑hero, blending chunky retro pixel art with modern shading and chaotic arcade energy. Use a centered portrait composition with the subject facing the camera, expressing bold, confident, high‑energy arcade‑hero attitude. Skin should appear pixel‑rendered with blocky shading, soft dithering, and stylized highlights. Edges should be crisp, with subtle pixel outlines and retro color‑banding. Apply a vibrant 16‑bit color palette: saturated primaries, neon accents, and high‑contrast arcade lighting. Add optional chaotic FX such as pixel sparks, glitch streaks, scanline distortions, power‑up flashes, or retro HUD particles. Randomize the following elements each time the prompt is used: Hairstyle (male variations): pixel‑punk spikes, retro 16‑bit action‑hero sweep, short textured pixel crop, stylized arcade quiff, chunky pixel curls, or neon‑lit warrior hair. Outfit (male variations): 16‑bit fighter jacket, pixel‑armor chestplate, neon arcade varsity jacket, retro hero tunic, cyber‑pixel vest, or bold color‑blocked arcade hoodie. Accessories (male variations): pixel visor, retro headset, glowing 16‑bit wristband, power‑up badge, LED earpiece, or none. Background: pixel grid with color bursts, retro game‑menu screen, neon scanline gradient, chaotic glitch field, or arcade cabinet glow. Include a customizable Gamer Tag displayed as a floating retro nameplate using pixel‑font or neon‑HUD lettering. Overall mood: chaotic, playful, retro‑arcade portrait with 16‑bit texture, glitch energy, and bold male pixel‑hero personality. Avoid unwanted elements such as text, logos, distortions, or additional people.
prompts.note: A specialized prompt to convert user photos into retro 16-bit arcade pixel art heroes.

prompts.title: European Urban Menswear Style Portrait
prompts.author: Picts by AI
prompts.prompt: A stylish {argument name="subject" default="young man"} stands centrally poised facing the camera in a confident, neutral stance with his weight subtly shifted, his face framed by a neatly trimmed beard and wavy dark brown hair styled with a slightly wet look. His relaxed eyes are concealed behind dark aviator sunglasses, exuding a casual yet sophisticated elegance without a smile. He is dressed in a textured {argument name="shirt style" default="rust-brown short-sleeve linen shirt"} with the top buttons undone and cuffs gently rolled, tucked into high-waisted navy blue pleated trousers secured by a woven belt, accessorized seamlessly with a watch on his left wrist. His relaxed right hand hangs naturally at thigh level, fingers curled effortlessly around the handles of a grey paper shopping bag, while his left hand rests casually inside his front left trouser pocket with his thumb and fingers subtly tucked into the opening. Behind him, the deep spatial depth of an outdoor {argument name="location" default="European city street"} unfolds, isolating the medium-scaled subject against a beautifully blurred vintage building facade in the midground. The smooth, matte warm beige and tan plaster walls reveal a subtle color gradient, elegant architectural molding, dark arched wooden doors, and metal window grilles, anchored by a weathered dark metal classic street bollard on the right and a solid dark gray asphalt concrete floor below. Deeper in the blurred background to the left, a thriving pedestrian wearing a tan and mustard top with dark pants is captured looking down at a phone. The scene is bathed in warm, golden, soft diffused natural daylight from a single source above, casting soft, gradual gray shadows under his collar, his chin, and within the rich folds of his linen shirt, while preserving delicate specular highlights on his forehead, the tip of his nose, and the shoulders of his shirt. The complementary medium-contrast color palette of rust brown, warm beige, navy blue, and dark charcoal creates an inviting, highly stylized urban menswear moment accompanied by ambient fill light. Captured straight-on as a realistic digital street photograph using an 85mm lens at a wide aperture with a 1/500s shutter speed and ISO 100, the tack-sharp, grain-free focus on the subject contrasts beautifully with the shallow depth of field and bokeh of the background. The aesthetic strongly mirrors Pitti Uomo and men's fashion editorial street style, finished with warm earthy color grading, subtle contrast enhancement, and pristine skin tone preservation, all perfectly framed in a 2:3 aspect ratio.
prompts.note: A highly detailed editorial prompt for a male fashion portrait on a European street with shallow depth of field.

prompts.title: E-commerce App Homepage
prompts.author: 卡尔的AI沃茨
prompts.prompt:
Generate a high-fidelity mobile e-commerce app homepage screenshot inspired by mainstream Chinese e-commerce apps in 2026. The interface should look fully realistic, with complete mobile-app UI logic and strong commercial design polish.

Layout requirements:
- status bar with time 9:41, 5G signal, and battery icon
- search area with a city selector on the left, a rounded search box in the center, and message plus scan icons on the right
- horizontal category tabs below the search area
- top promotional carousel banner
- 10-icon function grid
- flash-sale module with countdown and three product cards
- "guess you like" two-column product waterfall with at least 6 product cards
- bottom tab bar with five tabs

Use these exact Chinese labels where appropriate:
- city: "杭州"
- search placeholder: "搜索耳机、咖啡机、运动鞋"
- category tabs: "推荐、数码、家电、服饰、美妆、食品、运动、家居"
- top banner: "618 预售开启" and "每满300减50"
- function grid: "超市、百亿补贴、秒杀、直播、充值中心、到家、领券、品牌馆、全球购、排行榜"
- flash sale title: "限时秒杀"
- recommendation section: "猜你喜欢"
- bottom tabs: "首页、分类、购物车、消息、我的"

All Chinese text must be clear and readable with realistic fonts. Spacing, icon style, white space, shadows, rounded corners, dividers, and tag treatments should closely resemble a real app screenshot rather than concept art.

prompts.title: Music Player Interface
prompts.author: 卡尔的AI沃茨
prompts.prompt:
Create a high-fidelity Chinese music app player interface screenshot in mobile portrait orientation, with refined visuals similar to a modern streaming player. Use dark mode, with the background derived from a blurred and diffused version of the album cover colors. Place a large square album cover in the center with subtle shadow and rounded corners.

Interface requirements:
- top status bar with time 18:26
- navigation bar with a back arrow on the left, a centered title, and a more-options icon on the right
- playback progress bar showing current time 01:42 and total duration 04:18
- playback controls for shuffle, previous, play/pause, next, and repeat
- lyrics section showing 5 to 7 scrolling lines, with the current line highlighted
- action row with like, comment, download, add to playlist, and share
- bottom area with device casting and playback queue entry

Use these exact Chinese labels and names:
- title: "正在播放"
- song name: "海边的晚风"
- artist: "林秋"
- album: "夏夜实验室"

The lyrics layout, button icons, reflections, shadows, and dark-mode layering should feel like a real production interface rather than a Dribbble concept.

prompts.title: Museum Catalog-Style Chinese Disassembly Infographic
prompts.author: OpenNana
prompts.prompt:
Please automatically generate a "museum catalog-style Chinese disassembly infographic" based on the [Subject].

The entire image is required to combine a realistic main visual, structural disassembly, Chinese annotations, material descriptions, pattern meanings, color meanings, and core feature summaries. You need to automatically determine the most appropriate main subject, clothing system, artifact structure, era style, key components, material craftsmanship, color scheme, and layout structure based on the [Subject], and the user does not need to provide any other information.

The overall style should be: national museum exhibition boards, historical clothing catalogs, and cultural/museum thematic infographics, rather than ordinary posters, ancient-style portraits, e-commerce detail pages, or anime illustrations. The background uses paper textures such as off-white, silk white, and light tea color, making the overall look premium, restrained, professional, and collectible.

The layout is fixed as:
- Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introduction
- Left: Structural disassembly area, with Chinese lead lines annotating key components, accompanied by close-up details
- Upper right: Material / craftsmanship / texture area, displaying real texture samples with descriptions
- Middle right: Pattern / color / meaning area, displaying the main color palette, pattern samples, and cultural explanations
- Bottom: Dressing order / composition flowchart + core feature summary

If the subject is suitable for character display, use a full-body standing posture of a real person as the central subject; if it is more suitable for artifacts or single structures, change it to a central subject disassembly diagram, but the overall form remains a complete Chinese infographic. All text must be in Simplified Chinese, clear, neat, and readable, without garbled characters, typos, English, or pinyin. The focus is on highlighting real structures, material differences, cultural explanations, and a catalog atmosphere.

Avoid: poster feel, studio portrait feel, e-commerce feel, anime feel, cosplay feel, random annotations, incorrect structures, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration.

prompts.title: Silhouette Universe Narrative Poster
prompts.author: Article
prompts.prompt:
Automatically generate a high-aesthetic "Silhouette Universe / Collector's Edition Narrative Poster" based on [theme: xxx]. Do not default to common containers such as bottles, hourglasses, glass domes, or pocket watches. Instead, let the AI choose the most symbolic, visually strong, and narratively suitable outer silhouette for the theme. The silhouette can be an artifact, building, gate, tower, archway, dome, stairwell, corridor, statue, profile, eye, hand, skull, wing, mask, mirror, throne, ring, crack, light curtain, shadow, geometric form, spatial cross-section, stage frame, abstract symbol, or any more creative contour that best represents the theme.

The goal is not to simply place a world inside an object, but to make the entire themed universe grow naturally within, around, and through the silhouette itself. The silhouette should be elegant, recognizable, and compositionally dominant. Inside or along its boundary, generate a rich and layered narrative world strongly tied to the theme, including iconic scenes, key architecture or spaces, symbols and metaphors, traces of characters or civilizations, foreground-midground-background depth, and atmosphere with emotional tension. Elements such as doors, staircases, bridges, water, smoke, paths, light sources, ruins, mechanical structures, landscapes, abstract forms, creatures, or props should all feel unified and organically integrated rather than pasted together.

The final composition should feel like a premium collector's poster with strong design value. The large shapes should feel stable, the main silhouette should be unmistakable, and the inner world should have depth, structure, and breathing room. Details should be rich but not crowded. You may add small human silhouettes, distant buildings, beams of light, doorways, bridges, steps, corridors, reflections, skylight, or far-background structures to enhance scale, story, and epic atmosphere. The overall mood should be quiet, grand, refined, and lingering rather than noisy or overloaded.

Blend the feeling of a collector's edition film poster, high-end narrative visual design, dreamy watercolor texture, and fine printed paper. Emphasize paper grain, feathered edges, watercolor brush marks, gentle diffusion, atmospheric perspective, soft haze, selective volumetric light, light passing through mist, generous negative space, and restrained layout. The image should feel premium, poetic, majestic, sacred, nostalgic, quiet, and mythic.

Let the AI choose an elevated color palette based on the theme, but keep it unified, restrained, tasteful, low-saturation, and premium. Avoid chaotic high saturation, cheap neon effects, or plastic digital color. Suitable palette families may include black-gold-gray, cool blue-gray, mist white-gray, brown-red with off-white, dark copper, aged paper tones, deep sea blue, twilight purple, or silver-gray, as long as they serve the theme.

Final requirement: the first glance should give strong theme recognition and a memorable silhouette, the second glance should reveal a complete narrative world, and the third glance should still reward close inspection with depth and aftertaste. Avoid generic backgrounds, hard cut-and-paste compositions, templated fantasy assets, video-game promo art vibes, excessive cartooning, or realism that kills the artistic mood. If appropriate, subtle titles, numbering, signatures, or marks can be added as part of the poster design, but they must never overpower the image.

prompts.title: Encyclopedia-Style Knowledge Card
prompts.author: Article
prompts.prompt:
Generate a high-quality vertical encyclopedia-style infographic for [topic].

This should not be a normal poster or a simple illustration. It should feel like a modular educational infographic that combines the clarity of a field guide, the structure of an encyclopedia page, the polish of a lifestyle knowledge card, and the shareability of a strong social-media explainer.

The image should include:
- a clear and appealing main visual of the topic
- several enlarged detail callouts
- multiple rounded modular information sections
- strong title hierarchy and highlighted key labels
- concise but information-rich educational content
- visual scoring, quick takeaways, or a Top 5 module

Adapt the content sections automatically based on the topic. Useful categories include:
basic profile, classification, appearance, habits or ecology, formation mechanism or structure, growth or usage conditions, care or maintenance advice, risks and cautions, suitable users or use cases, pros and cons, and a quick scorecard.

Visual requirements:
use a clean light background, soft colors, subtle shadows, refined small icons, rounded information cards, and neat layout. The information density should be high but not crowded, and the final image should feel publishable, collectible, and repeatable as a knowledge-card format rather than an advertisement.

Do not make it look like a commercial promo poster. Emphasize knowledge organization, modular information, and a field-guide presentation.
